text.title: Core VUI Design Principles Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Core VUI Design Principles to a concrete case.

section.title: Recipe assistant

example.code:
Runtime: Custom LLM-VUI (Realtime).
Simplicity: each step is one ingredient or one action (<=10 sec). After step, ask 'Ready for the next step?'. Natural conversation: barge-in honoured ('stop', 'back'). Voice-activity detection ends user turn. Context awareness: remembers current recipe + step number across 8 turns or 10 min, whichever first.
Error retry: never repeats verbatim — rephrases + adds example.

section.note: Each principle is operationalised concretely with measurable knobs (15s, 8 turns, 10 min).
